THE CARD BINDER

Every card in the box. Spoilers, obviously — the binder shows everything.

39 COMMON · 52 UNCOMMON · 19 RARE · 11 EPIC · 7 JUNK

← BACK TO THE PADDOCK PLAY IN BROWSER

COMMON (39)

The workhorses. Every deck leans on a few of these.

UNCOMMON (52)

Where builds start to get opinions.

RARE (19)

Run-defining. You will remember drafting these.

EPIC (11)

The molten-gold three percent. When one lands, the run bends around it.

JUNK (7)

Nobody drafts junk. Junk happens to you.

128 cards and counting. Drafted mid-race, in slow motion, while your toy car holds a corner.
